query: SELECT id, originalName, rowCount, JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.groupByField') as groupByField, JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.fields[0].name') as field0_name, JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.fields[0].groupedTop5') as field0_groupedTop5 FROM sessions WHERE originalName LIKE '%爱比爱尼%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 2;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user UpQ6nzGwi5FMPrH.root --database CRyFQH5qGudysyWQuRqoNj --execute SELECT id, originalName, rowCount, JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.groupByField') as groupByField, JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.fields[0].name') as field0_name, JSON_EXTRACT(dfInfo, '$.fields[0].groupedTop5') as field0_groupedTop5 FROM sessions WHERE originalName LIKE '%爱比爱尼%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 2;
